title: cavendishia ruiz-teranii
intro: Cavendishia ruiz-teranii is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae, commonly known as the Andean bogberry or Andean blueberry. The plant is native to South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cavendishia ruiz-teranii include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
